etn 3.0.0.9000
  • Reference

    • Configure credentials
    • Options
  • Changelog

List all available tag serial numbers

Source: R/list_tag_serial_numbers.R
list_tag_serial_numbers.Rd

List all available tag serial numbers

Usage

list_tag_serial_numbers(connection)

Arguments

connection

A connection to the ETN database. This argument is no longer used. You will be prompted for credentials instead.

Value

A vector of all unique tag_serial_numbers present in common.tag_device.

Examples

list_tag_serial_numbers()
#>     [1] "0A4E2699"       "0A4F2700"       "0A4G2701"       "0A4H2702"      
#>     [5] "0A4J2704"       "0A6E"           "0A6F"           "0A6G"          
#>     [9] "0A6H"           "0A6I"           "0A6J"           "0A6K"

#>    [17] "0A6P"           "0A6Q"           "0A6R"           "0A6S"
